title: acalypha inaequilatera
intro: Acalypha inaequilatera, also known as the unequal-winged cup plant, is a plant species that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Acalypha inaequilatera include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its use as a diuretic to treat urinary tract infections. Acalypha inaequilatera can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves and roots can also be used in traditional medicine preparations, such as tinctures and ointments.
